hyperedges.label: The Five Laws of the Höski Framework
Service Business Extensions to the Five Laws (Laws 1-6 adapted)
hyperedges.source_file: The Höski Framework - Additions and Edits.md

hyperedges.label: Three Client Tracks (DTC, Service Business, Track C High-Ticket Retail)
Anand Desai Law Account Remediation (Broken Ads, Web Audit, Execution Plan)
Dentiste Lead Quality Improvement Actions (CDCP negatives, competitor negatives, Insurance pause)
EJPR Conversion Tracking Remediation (GA4 fix, cross-domain, checkout tagging)
Claude Code Google Ads PPC Workspace Setup Components
Compliance-Regulated Verticals at Höski (Healthcare + Legal)
hyperedges.source_file: The Höski Framework - Additions and Edits.md

hyperedges.label: Conversion Tracking as Universal Prerequisite
hyperedges.rationale: Conversion tracking health is an explicit prerequisite enforced across the Google Ads Strategist, Google Manager six-checks, PM dependency graph, PPC audit, and client onboarding — all agents gate optimization work on confirmed tracking integrity

hyperedges.label: Message Match Principle Across Google and Meta
hyperedges.rationale: Message match between ad and landing page is a central diagnostic concept referenced across the CRO strategist, the LP deep framework, the Meta conversion optimizer (funnel layer), and the Meta creative performance four diagnostic metrics — all converge on the ad-to-page promise gap as a primary conversion failure mode

hyperedges.label: Smart Bidding Data Pool Requirements (Google)
hyperedges.rationale: The 50+ conversions/month Smart Bidding threshold is jointly enforced by the Campaign Architect (structural decisions), the Strategist (bid strategy selection logic), the Tracking Guardian (signal integrity), the pacing agent (no reallocation to learning campaigns), and the Manager (escalation trigger when data is insufficient)

hyperedges.label: Meta Post-iOS14 Measurement Adaptation Framework
hyperedges.rationale: Post-iOS14 signal degradation is a shared context across the Meta Conversion Optimizer, Meta Audience Architect, MER as the ground-truth bypass metric, and the reporting analyst's internal vs. client report distinction — all adapt to partial observability caused by ATT opt-outs

hyperedges.label: Marketing Director Orchestration Layer
hyperedges.rationale: The Marketing Director is the orchestration hub: it defines the dependency graph, routes through the Strategist/Manager layer, requires QA verdict before final delivery, and its dependency graph mirrors the PM's project sequencing — these agents share the same workflow ordering logic

hyperedges.label: Creative as Primary Variable on Meta
hyperedges.rationale: The principle that creative is the primary variable on Meta (stated in CLAUDE.md) is operationalized across the Creative Performance Analyst (creative as targeting), Creative Strategist (hook philosophy and testing roadmap), the Audience Architect (signal model — creative teaches Meta who to target), and bid/budget allocation — all agents reinforce creative volume and quality as the primary optimization lever

hyperedges.label: Google Shopping Feed as Campaign Foundation
hyperedges.rationale: The Shopping Feed Optimizer establishes that feed quality governs auction eligibility before bidding — fix feed first, then optimize bids. The custom label strategy directly enables product group sculpting. The Google Ads Strategist routes Shopping campaigns through this agent's frameworks.

hyperedges.source_file: The Höski Framework - Additions and Edits.md

hyperedges.label: Conversion Tracking as Universal Prerequisite
hyperedges.rationale: Conversion tracking health is an explicit prerequisite enforced across the Google Ads Strategist, Google Manager six-checks, PM dependency graph, PPC audit, and client onboarding — all agents gate optimization work on confirmed tracking integrity

hyperedges.label: Message Match Principle Across Google and Meta
hyperedges.rationale: Message match between ad and landing page is a central diagnostic concept referenced across the CRO strategist, the LP deep framework, the Meta conversion optimizer (funnel layer), and the Meta creative performance four diagnostic metrics — all converge on the ad-to-page promise gap as a primary conversion failure mode

hyperedges.label: Smart Bidding Data Pool Requirements (Google)
hyperedges.rationale: The 50+ conversions/month Smart Bidding threshold is jointly enforced by the Campaign Architect (structural decisions), the Strategist (bid strategy selection logic), the Tracking Guardian (signal integrity), the pacing agent (no reallocation to learning campaigns), and the Manager (escalation trigger when data is insufficient)

hyperedges.label: Meta Post-iOS14 Measurement Adaptation Framework
hyperedges.rationale: Post-iOS14 signal degradation is a shared context across the Meta Conversion Optimizer, Meta Audience Architect, MER as the ground-truth bypass metric, and the reporting analyst's internal vs. client report distinction — all adapt to partial observability caused by ATT opt-outs

hyperedges.label: Marketing Director Orchestration Layer
hyperedges.rationale: The Marketing Director is the orchestration hub: it defines the dependency graph, routes through the Strategist/Manager layer, requires QA verdict before final delivery, and its dependency graph mirrors the PM's project sequencing — these agents share the same workflow ordering logic

hyperedges.label: Creative as Primary Variable on Meta
hyperedges.rationale: The principle that creative is the primary variable on Meta (stated in CLAUDE.md) is operationalized across the Creative Performance Analyst (creative as targeting), Creative Strategist (hook philosophy and testing roadmap), the Audience Architect (signal model — creative teaches Meta who to target), and bid/budget allocation — all agents reinforce creative volume and quality as the primary optimization lever

hyperedges.label: Google Shopping Feed as Campaign Foundation
hyperedges.rationale: The Shopping Feed Optimizer establishes that feed quality governs auction eligibility before bidding — fix feed first, then optimize bids. The custom label strategy directly enables product group sculpting. The Google Ads Strategist routes Shopping campaigns through this agent's frameworks.
